achievements: Design system audit (3 passes): ~200 files tokenized — all text-sm/base/lg/xl replaced with design tokens, spacing tokens registered in @theme inline, twMerge extended to prevent token conflicts

Sprint 10 notification engine: full stack — DB schema (notifications + preferences tables), email rate limiter, 6 event handlers, 4 API routes, useNotifications hook, notification dropdown UI, redesigned settings page
LMS: Courses/Modules/Lessons collections, Drizzle progress tables, enrollment/progress APIs with rate limiting, 10 frontend components, 3 lesson pages, search vector SQL for courses+lessons
Mobile responsive polish (2 rounds): mobile sidebar drawer, h-dvh fix, modal/dropdown viewport safety, table overflow, next/image migration, breadcrumb wrap, list card stacking

Component unification: SectionHeading (4 old components → 1), FormField/FormInput/FormTextarea, Button/ButtonLink (24 raw buttons), Card variants (surface/elevated/surface-lowest), GuestShell, CategoryPill single source
CMD+K search palette: PostgreSQL full-text search across posts + courses + lessons, grouped results with type icons, keyboard nav, recent searches
Infrastructure: proxy matchers for /learn + /tag, block redirect loop fix, JWT try-catch on DB revalidation, rate limiter keyed by IP+pathname, post afterDelete bookmark cleanup
improvements: In-memory rate limiters (lib/notifications/rate-limit.ts, lib/auth/rate-limit.ts) reset on every server restart — replace with Redis or DB-backed counters before production
lib/notifications/create.ts broadcastNotification queries all users into memory — add cursor-based batching for large user bases
Tool preview pages (airdrops, market-direction, picks, tracker) render static HIGHLIGHTS arrays with no real data — wire up to actual Payload collections or external APIs
scripts/seed.ts is 39k tokens — split into per-collection seed modules to keep it maintainable
useNotifications polls on a fixed interval — switch to SSE or WebSocket to reduce unnecessary requests once user base grows
Email templates (lib/email/templates/) are plain strings — move to a proper template engine (React Email / MJML) for easier design iteration
next_tasks: Sprint 11 — Community Features: wire real community feed (forum posts or Discord embed), member list, community notifications
Sprint 5/6 — Wallet + Payment: connect wallet (wagmi/viem), on-chain Pro verification, Stripe/crypto checkout, subscription state synced to users table
Sprint 7/8 — Live tool data: Market Direction page needs real signal source, Picks needs Payload Posts integration, Portfolio Tracker needs price API
Sprint 9 — Airdrop Hub: replace static HIGHLIGHTS with a live Airdrops Payload collection + eligibility checker

Drizzle migration for notification_preferences v2: the schema was redesigned from flat booleans to per-subtype rows (0006) but seed.ts may still insert old format — verify register flow seeds correctly
public/illustrations/ directory is untracked — audit what's there and commit or gitignore
End-to-end auth flow test: verify email → dashboard redirect, blocked user redirect, expired Pro → isPro=false path
risks: CRITICAL — No automated tests: zero test files found across the entire codebase; auth flows, payment gating, and notification delivery have no regression coverage
HIGH — In-memory rate limiters will silently stop working under multi-instance deploys (Vercel edge replicas, Docker Swarm) — state is not shared across processes

HIGH — Drizzle migration journal (drizzle/meta/_journal.json) only goes to 0006 but 0006_notification_engine.sql rewrites the notification_preferences schema; existing dev DBs need a fresh migration run
MEDIUM — broadcastNotification fetches all user IDs in one query (no pagination) — will cause OOM or timeouts at scale if triggered for article-published events with large user bases

MEDIUM — LMS sequential unlock logic (lib/courses/lessonAccess.ts) is checked client-side via props — a user could call the progress API directly to mark lessons complete out of order; add server-side enforcement in the PATCH /api/courses/progress route
MEDIUM — public/illustrations/ is untracked in git — if these are referenced by components, production builds on CI will fail or silently serve 404s
LOW — tsconfig.tsbuildinfo is 223k tokens and committed to the repo — should be gitignored to avoid bloating git history
